title: Tool: recall_similar_outreach
userStory: As the agent, I want a recall tool scoped to past Outreach so that drafts can lean on what worked.
acceptanceCriteria: Calls Graphiti search_nodes filtered to Outreach-typed nodes ordered by vector similarity
Returns message body + outcome (responded? hired?) per hit
Verify: tool invocation returns at least one historical outreach when queried about a known persona
